/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/TestHotel.dir/TestHotel_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestHotel.dir/src/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestHotel.dir/src/Room.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestHotel.dir/src/StandardRoom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestHotel.dir/src/DeluxeRoom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestHotel.dir/src/SuiteRoom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestHotel.dir/src/RoomManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestHotel.dir/src/Customer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestHotel.dir/src/VIPCustomer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestHotel.dir/src/Booking.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestHotel.dir/src/BookingException.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestHotel.dir/src/BookingManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestHotel.dir/src/Date.cpp.o -o TestHotel
